sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n70513" key="neurotenh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">νευρο-τενής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n70513.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">stretched by sinews,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">παγὶς ν.</foreign> a snare <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of gut,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.109</biblScope> </bibl> (Antip.).</sense> </entryFree>
